character.name:
Vampire lord boss, isometric pixel art, gothic horror. Tall elegant 
vampire standing upright, long flowing dark cape that spreads wide 
at the base. Ornate crown of black thorns on head. Pale bone-white 
face with piercing red glowing eyes. Three dark purple ritual orbs 
orbiting around him. Long robes with dark crimson trim. Regal, 
menacing, aristocratic silhouette. Colors: near-black #08020e robes, 
deep crimson accents #8a0020, purple orbit orbs #6a30ff. 
Crisp pixel art, dark background, transparent if possible.
